name: LMS - Full Platform (Auth + Dashboard + Courses + Students + Generate + Publish)

data.description: Extracts action, email, password, full_name from body
data.name: function
data.label: Auth_Extract

data.description: Builds SELECT + UPDATE + log SQL for login
data.name: function
data.label: Build_Login_SQL

data.description: Validates password and returns user object
data.name: function
data.label: Check_Login

parameters.code:
const email = String(outputs['Auth_Extract'].success.email || '').replace(/'/g,"''");
return { logLogout: `INSERT INTO public.auth_logs (email, action, status) VALUES ('${email}','logout','success');` };

executeQueryParams.query: select (select count(*) from courses where status='published') as total_courses,(select count(*) from public.students where status='active') as total_students,(select count(*) from public.enrollments where completed=false) as active_enrollments,coalesce(round(avg(case when completed then 100 else progress end),0),0) as completion_rate from public.enrollments;
select id,title,category,level,status,duration_hours,created_at from public.courses where status='published' order by created_at desc limit 5;
select id,full_name,email,status,created_at from public.students where status='active' order by created_at desc limit 5;

data.description: Fetches chart data: enrollments by month and courses by category
data.name: postgres action
data.label: PG Charts

executeQueryParams.query: select * from (   select     'enrollments_by_month' as chart_type,     to_char(enrolled_at, 'Mon') as label,     count(*)::int as value,     date_trunc('month', enrolled_at) as sort_date   from public.enrollments   where enrolled_at >= now() - interval '6 months'   group by to_char(enrolled_at, 'Mon'), date_trunc('month', enrolled_at)    union all    select     'courses_by_category' as chart_type,     coalesce(category, 'Uncategorized') as label,     count(*)::int as value,     null::timestamp as sort_date   from public.courses   where status = 'published'   group by category ) t order by   case when chart_type = 'enrollments_by_month' then 0 else 1 end,   sort_date nulls last,   value desc;

data.description: Merges all dashboard data into final response
data.name: function
data.label: Dash_Format

data.description: CORS + token validation + action extraction for /courses
data.name: function
data.label: Courses_Validate

executeQueryParams.query: select id,title,slug,description,category,level,duration_hours,status,source,created_at from public.courses where status!='archived' order by created_at desc;

data.description: CORS + token validation + action extraction for /students
data.name: function
data.label: Students_Validate

executeQueryParams.query: select s.id,s.full_name,s.email,s.status,s.created_at,(select count(*) from public.enrollments e where e.student_id=s.id) as enrollment_count from public.students s order by s.created_at desc limit 50;

parameters.code:
const action=outputs['Students_Validate'].success.action;
return { success:true, action, data:input.rows||[] };
